titleStmt.title: SII 18.45: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 45. (B.K. No. 117 of 1932-33.) KABBŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab near the temple of Kallēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of [Ja]gadēkamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 947, Ās11vayuja śu. Pañchami, Monday. The cyclic year is lost. Śaka 947 coincided with the cyclic year Krōdhana. But the details are irregular. The tithi cited corresponded to A.D. 1025, September 29; the week-day, however, was Wednesday.

It states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kundamarasa, the son of Iṟiva[beḍaṅga]dēva was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand and Sēnavallara Kaṇṇamma was administering Bāsavura Hundred-and-forty, a certain person (name lost) obtained the gāvuṇḍutana of Karbūr (modern Kabbūr, where the record is found).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
gadēkamalladēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhige sale
padmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁ
raṁ banavāsipuravarādhipaṁ cāvuṇḍālabdhavaraprasādaṁ
ṭakēsari sujanakayvāraṁ jagadēkavīraṁ Ārōhakatri
parakāṁtāputraṁ vyāḷagajamallaṁ pisuṇahritsella matta
gabhīmaṁ saṁgrāmarāmaṁ riphubaḷatimiramārttaṇḍaṁ nuḍidante gaṇḍa
bhayajvaraṁ vīravidyādharaṁ gajarājamallanartthige nallaṁ maṇḍalika
ṭṭaṁ sattigana caṭṭaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmadiṟuva
dēvara magaṁ śrīmat kuṁdamarasar banavāsipannirccāsiramumaṁ
mire . sēnavallara kaṇnammaṁ bāsavuraṁ nūṟanālvattarkkaṁ nārggā vuṇḍu
mire . svasti sakanṛpakāḷātītasaṁvatsarasateṁga 947 neya
saṁvatsarada Aśvaija suddha paṁcami sōmavāradaṁdu baysara
yyaṁ karbbūra gāvuṇḍutanamaṁ nārggāvuṇḍa kaṇnammanalli vika
māgire paḍedaṁ . Idanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrado
sirbbar brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāyira kavileyumanaḷida paṁ
camahāpātakanakkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁ
dharā ṣaṣṭhirvvariṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 18.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
